nasb.text: and to the blast of a trumpet and the sound of words which sound was such that those who heard begged that no further word be spoken to them.

esv.text: and the sound of a trumpet and a voice whose words made the hearers beg that no further messages be spoken to them.

cnv.text: 號筒的響聲和說話的聲音；那些聽見這聲音的人，都請求　神不要再向他們多說話；

ccb.text: 号角声和说话声的西奈山，听见这些声音的人都哀求不要再向他们说话了。

csbs.text: 号角的响声和说话的声音面前——那些听见这声音的人，都恳求不要再向他们说话了，
